visa_intro_1: Amakhadi esikweletu ne-Bitcoin kokubili kuyizinhlelo zokukhokha, kodwa kusebenza ngezindlela ezihlukene kakhulu.
visa_intro_2: Amakhadi esikweletu afana ne-Visa ayizinethiwekhi ezivalelekile ezilawulwa yizikhungo zezezimali, ngenkathi i-Bitcoin iyinethiwekhi evulekile enoma ubani angayisebenzisa.
visa_intro_3: Ake sibheke umehluko phakathi kwalezi zinhlelo ezimbili zokukhokha: I-Bitcoin & Visa.
point_1_summary_1: I-Bitcoin iyinethiwekhi evulekile enoma ubani angahlanganyela futhi ayisebenzise ngaphandle kwemvume. Izinethiwekhi zamakhadi esikweletu efana ne-Visa ziyizinhlelo ezivalelekile ezilawulwa yizikhungo zezezimali ezingala ukufinyelela kunoma ubani ezikhetha ukumvala.
point_1_summary_2: Lokhu kwenza i-Bitcoin ifakelwe futhi ifinyeleleke kubantu emhlabeni wonke, ikakhulukazi abangenawo amabhange noma abanemali encane.
point_2_summary_1: Izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin azinazimali zabathengisi, ngenkathi izinkampani zamakhadi esikweletu ngokuvamile zikhokhisa abathengisi ngamaphesenti angaba ngu-3% ngokwenzeka ngakunye.
point_2_summary_2: Funda ukuthi ibhizinisi lakho lingonga kanjani imali
point_2_summary_3: ngokwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin esikhundleni sokukhokha izimali zokukhokha ngamakhadi esikweletu.
point_3_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza ku-blockchain esobala lapho zonke izinkokhelo zingaqinisekiswa yinoma ubani. Izinethiwekhi zamakhadi esikweletu zisebenza njengezinhlelo ezivalelekile, eziqondene nenkampani lapho imininingwane yezinkokhelo ifihliwe kubukekwa komphakathi.
point_3_summary_2: Lokhu kusobala kwenza i-Bitcoin ithembeke kakhulu futhi kuvumele ukuqinisekiswa okuzimele kokuphelela kwenethiwekhi.
point_4_summary_1: Izinkampani zamakhadi esikweletu zingavalela ama-akhawunti, zivimbe izinkokhelo, noma zinqabe ukuhlinzeka nganoma yisiphi isikhathi. I-Bitcoin ayikwazi ukuvalwa noma ukulawulwa yinoma isiphi isiphathimandla esiyinhloko.
point_4_summary_2: Nge-Bitcoin, ugcina ukulawula emalini yakho futhi awukwazi ukuqedwa esiStimini sokukhokha.
point_5_summary_1: Amakhadi esikweletu adala isikweletu esingahlangana nezinga lenzalo eliphezulu uma lingakhokhwa ngokushesha, kwesinye isikhathi eledlula amaphesenti angu-25% unyaka ngamunye.
point_5_summary_2: Izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin ziyizikhokho zokugcina ngaphandle kokudala isikweletu - ungasebenzisa kuphela i-Bitcoin onayo ngempela.
point_6_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ivumela ukuzigcinela, okusho ukuthi ungabamba futhi ulawule imali yakho ngaphandle kokuncika emabhange noma kubacubunguli bezinkokhelo.
point_6_summary_3: ukuze uqonde ukuthi ungathatha kanjani ukulawula kwemali yakho. Amakhadi esikweletu ahlala edinga abaphakathi njengamabhange nabacubunguli bezinkokhelo.
point_7_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza 24/7 emhlabeni wonke ngaphandle kwamahora ebhizinisi noma izingqinamba zendawo.
point_7_summary_2: Izinethiwekhi zamakhadi esikweletu zinamahora ebhizinisi, amahora okulungisa, nezingqinamba zendawo ezingavimba izinkokhelo ekukhokhelweni.
